name: pi-loop-detector
description: Detects looping agent behavior and recommends deterministic interventions.

interface.shortDescription: Detect repeated nonproductive agent behavior early.
interface.longDescription: Provides heuristic loop detection, compact evidence packets, optional isolated judging, and deterministic intervention recommendations.
defaultPrompt: Detect whether this agent is stuck in a tool loop.
Build an evidence packet for suspicious repeated tool behavior.
Recommend a deterministic intervention for a looping run.
